name: CORTICAL DESMOID
definition: AVULSIVE CORTICAL IRREGULARITY = PERIOSTEAL / SUBPERIOSTEAL DESMOID SUBPERIOSTEAL / CORTICAL ABRASION = SUBPERIOSTEAL CORTICAL DEFECT rare fibrous lesion of the periosteum

demographics.Histo: shallow defect filled with proliferating fibroblasts, multiple small fragments of

general: 1-2 cm irregular, shallow, concave saucerlike crater with sharp margin
